student.title: Student AI Stack
student.subtitle: Everything you need to ace your academics — ₹0/month

tools.name: Perplexity AI
tools.why: Better than Google for academic research — gives cited answers with sources
tools.prompt: Explain [your topic] with academic sources. Include key theories, recent findings, and cite the original papers.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.why: Organize notes + write essays in one place with AI assistance
tools.prompt: Help me outline an essay on [topic]. Include thesis statement, 3 main arguments with evidence, and a conclusion.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.why: Turn your essay into a stunning presentation in 30 seconds
tools.prompt: Create a 10-slide presentation on [topic] for a university class. Professional style, include key data points and visuals.

tools.name: Bolt.new
tools.why: Create project portfolios and web apps for assignments — no coding needed
tools.freeLimit: Daily token limit, resets every day
tools.prompt: Build a portfolio website showcasing my [project type] with sections for overview, methodology, results, and a contact form.

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.why: Fix grammar, tone, and clarity before submitting anything
tools.freeLimit: Unlimited grammar checks on free tier
tools.prompt: Check this text for grammar, clarity, and academic tone. Suggest improvements.

freelancer.title: Freelancer AI Stack
freelancer.subtitle: Land clients and deliver work faster — ₹0/month

tools.name: Lovable
tools.why: Build a professional portfolio site in 10 minutes with AI
tools.prompt: Build me a freelancer portfolio website with hero section, services grid, project gallery with hover effects, testimonials, and a contact form. Dark modern theme.

tools.name: Canva
tools.why: Create logos, social media posts, proposals — everything visual
tools.prompt: Create a professional proposal template for [service type] with company branding, scope of work, timeline, and pricing sections.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.why: Draft proposals, cold emails, and client communications instantly
tools.prompt: Write a professional proposal for [client name] who needs [service]. Include scope, timeline, deliverables, and a compelling value proposition. Keep it under 300 words.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.why: Create pitch decks that win clients — from text to slides in seconds
tools.prompt: Create a 7-slide pitch deck for my freelance [service] business. Include: problem, solution, my process, portfolio highlights, pricing, and call to action.

tools.name: Zapier
tools.why: Auto-send follow-ups, track leads, connect your tools together
tools.prompt: Set up an automation: when someone fills my contact form, send them a thank-you email and add their details to a Google Sheet.

founder.title: Startup Founder Stack
founder.subtitle: Launch your startup with AI — ₹0 to start

tools.name: Perplexity AI
tools.why: Research your market, competitors, and audience before writing a line of code
tools.prompt: Analyze the market for [your idea]. Who are the top 5 competitors? What's missing? What would a first-time user want? Include market size estimates.

tools.name: Lovable
tools.why: Go from idea to deployed app in hours, not months
tools.prompt: Build a [type] app with user authentication, a dashboard showing [key metrics], and a landing page with pricing tiers. Modern, clean design.

tools.name: Looka
tools.why: Generate a complete brand kit — logo, colors, fonts — in minutes
tools.prompt: Create a logo for [startup name] in the [industry] space. Modern, minimal, tech-forward style. Color palette should convey trust and innovation.

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.why: Generate landing page copy, email sequences, and social posts
tools.prompt: Write a hero section for [startup name]. Include a headline (max 8 words), subheadline explaining the value proposition, and 3 feature bullet points.

tools.name: Gamma
tools.why: Create investor-ready pitch decks from your business plan
tools.prompt: Create a 12-slide investor pitch deck for [startup name]. Include: problem, solution, market size, business model, traction, team, and ask. YC-style format.

creator.title: Content Creator Stack
creator.subtitle: Create viral content across every platform — ₹0/month

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.why: Write video scripts, captions, and content ideas that hook viewers
tools.prompt: Write a YouTube script about [topic] in a conversational tone. Include a hook in the first 5 seconds, 3 main points, and a call to action. Target length: 8 minutes.

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.why: Generate eye-catching thumbnails with perfect text rendering
tools.prompt: Create a YouTube thumbnail with bold text '[YOUR TITLE]' in a dramatic, high-contrast style. Vibrant colors, expressive facial expression placeholder, clean composition.

tools.name: CapCut
tools.why: Professional video editing with auto-captions, effects, and transitions — free
tools.prompt: Edit this video with: auto-captions in bold white text, smooth transitions between scenes, trending background music, and zoom effects on key moments.

tools.name: Opus Clip
tools.why: Turn one long video into 10 viral short clips automatically
tools.prompt: Extract the most engaging 30-60 second clips from this video. Focus on moments with strong hooks, surprising facts, or emotional reactions.

tools.name: Canva
tools.why: Create channel art, social posts, and brand assets in one place
tools.prompt: Create a YouTube channel banner for [channel name] about [topic]. Modern style, include channel name and upload schedule. 2560x1440px.

developer.title: Developer AI Stack
developer.subtitle: Code faster, ship sooner — all free tiers

tools.name: Cursor
tools.why: AI-powered code editor that writes, edits, and explains code with your codebase as context
tools.prompt: Build a REST API with Express.js that has user authentication (JWT), CRUD operations for [resource], input validation, and error handling. Include proper project structure.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.why: Debug errors, explain code, and get architecture advice instantly
tools.prompt: I'm getting this error: [paste error]. Here's my code: [paste code]. Explain what's wrong, why it happens, and give me the fixed code.

tools.name: Bolt.new
tools.why: Quickly prototype and deploy frontend UIs without context-switching
tools.prompt: Build a modern dashboard UI with React that shows [data type] in cards, a sidebar navigation, and a search/filter bar. Deploy-ready with Tailwind CSS.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.why: Upload your docs and get an AI that answers questions about YOUR codebase
tools.prompt: Analyze this documentation and create a quick-start guide with setup instructions, API reference, and common troubleshooting steps.

tools.name: Zapier
tools.why: Connect GitHub, Slack, and deployment tools for automated workflows
tools.prompt: When a new commit is pushed to main branch on GitHub, run tests, and if they pass, send a Slack notification with the deployment status.
